hero.headline: Maintenance Plans.
hero.body: Our precision maintenance program treats your home like a high-performance system — scheduled tune-ups, duct sealing, and vent care to eliminate emergency failures.

sections.title: System Integrity Tiers
sections.subtitle: Select the level of protection that fits your home's ecosystem.

items.name: Silver Plan
items.description: Essential bi-annual tune-ups for standard efficiency systems.

items.name: Gold Plan
items.description: Comprehensive protection including priority diagnostics.

items.name: Platinum Plan
items.description: Zero-worry maintenance for high-end residential networks.

sections.title: Standard Network Protocol
sections.subtitle: Seasonal System Synchronization
sections.body: Every six months, our specialists perform a complete infrastructure audit to ensure your system operates at peak thermal efficiency.

items.title: Air Flow Optimization
items.description: Filter replacement and duct integrity check to maximize cubic feet per minute (CFM).

items.title: Duct & Vent Integrity
items.description: Supply and return path inspection, sealing leaks, and vent clearing to restore balanced airflow room to room.

items.title: Electrical Load Testing
items.description: Detailed amperage and voltage draw analysis on motors to prevent component failure.

sections.title: The Priority Pipeline.
sections.body: As a plan member, you bypass the standard service queue. Your comfort is our priority infrastructure project.

hero.headline: Heating & Furnace Services
hero.body: Engineered for efficiency. Designed for comfort. Our advanced heating solutions maintain optimal home performance through the coldest seasons.

items.label: Uneven Warmth
items.title: Thermal Inconsistency
items.description: Noticeable cold spots or rooms that refuse to reach set temperature indicate ducting or blower issues.

items.label: Critical Failure
items.title: Ignition & Burner Issues
items.description: Flickering pilot lights, yellow flames, or repeated cycling are symptoms of combustion inefficiency that require immediate expert calibration.

items.label: Acoustic Anomalies
items.title: Mechanical Noise
items.description: Rattling, squealing, or thumping sounds often signal belt wear or motor bearing failure before a total breakdown occurs.

items.label: Efficiency Loss
items.title: Spiking Energy Bills
items.description: A sudden increase in fuel or electricity consumption suggests your heating unit is overworking due to internal friction or leaks.

sections.title: The Heart of Your Home Network
sections.body: Your furnace isn't just a box; it's the central hub of a complex thermal network. We optimize the entire path from combustion to air delivery.

features.title: Burner Calibration
features.description: Optimizing gas flow for 98% AFUE efficiency.

features.title: Airflow Filtration
features.description: HEPA-grade protection for your respiratory health.

hero.headline: Air Conditioning Services
hero.body: Advanced cooling systems engineered for Ontario's humidity profiles. Reliable performance when Toronto summers demand peak output.

sections.title: System Diagnostics
sections.subtitle: Identify symptoms in your home's cooling network before they lead to critical failure.

items.title: Weak Airflow
items.description: Inconsistent pressure across vents suggests blockage or fan motor degradation.

items.title: Strange Noises
items.description: Grinding or squealing sounds often indicate mechanical friction or belt failure.

items.title: Excess Humidity
items.description: Moisture buildup suggests the evaporator coil is failing to dehumidify effectively.

items.title: Cycling Errors
items.description: Frequent on/off cycles (short-cycling) stress components and waste energy.

sections.title: Service Modules
sections.subtitle: We provide end-to-end lifecycle management for residential cooling hardware.

images.alt: Smart thermostat controlling precision cooling system
Modern living room with efficient air conditioning

hero.headline: Indoor Air Quality
hero.body: Hospital-grade purification integrated into your existing ductwork for whole-home protection against allergens, VOCs, and pathogens.

items.title: Excessive Dust Accumulation
items.description: Visible dust on surfaces shortly after cleaning indicates a failure in your HVAC system's filtration cycle.

items.title: Static & Dry Respiratory
items.description: Dry winter air causes static shocks and irritated sinuses. This suggests your humidity control is offline.

items.title: Lingering Household Odors
items.description: Stale air or cooking smells that won't dissipate indicate poor ventilation and lack of active carbon scrubbing.

sections.title: Purification Ecosystem
sections.subtitle: We integrate hospital-grade technology directly into your existing ductwork for whole-home protection.

items.title: Whole-Home Air Purifiers
items.description: Our HEPA-active filtration systems capture microscopic pathogens, allergens, and VOCs before they ever reach your rooms.

items.title: Humidifiers
items.description: Steam and evaporative systems to protect your wood floors, musical instruments, and respiratory health.

items.title: Energy Recovery Ventilators
items.description: Fresh outdoor air without losing heat or cooling. The lungs of your modern, airtight home.

sections.title: The Integration Process
sections.subtitle: How we upgrade your existing infrastructure to a high-performance air network.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: Laser-precise monitoring of particulate matter and humidity across multiple zones.

steps.title: Configuration
steps.description: Engineering a custom component stack that interfaces seamlessly with your air handler.

steps.title: Validation
steps.description: Post-install testing to verify the new IAQ levels meet our medical-grade standards.

items.question: Can these systems be added to my current furnace?
items.answer: Yes. Our IAQ modules are designed as universal retrofits that attach to the return air plenum of almost any forced-air heating and cooling system.

items.question: How often do filters need to be changed?
items.answer: Standard high-capacity media filters typically require replacement every 6 to 12 months, depending on your household environment and usage levels.

items.question: Does UV-C light produce ozone?
items.answer: No. We exclusively install ozone-free UV-C lamps that operate at specific nanometer wavelengths designed to neutralize DNA without generating harmful byproducts.

sections.title: Ready for a System Upgrade?
sections.body: Schedule a comprehensive air quality audit today and take the first step toward a healthier home network.

hero.headline: Water Heater Services
hero.body: Precision engineering for your home's hot water network. From smart tankless upgrades to high-capacity storage, we ensure your comfort flow is never interrupted.

sections.title: Hot Water Network Options
sections.subtitle: Engineered solutions for every household demand profile.

items.title: Tank Storage Systems
items.description: High-efficiency storage tanks with advanced insulation and smart leak detection for reliable whole-home hot water.

items.title: Tankless On-Demand
items.description: Endless hot water with zero standby loss. Ideal for high-demand households and space-constrained utility rooms.

items.title: Hybrid Heat Pump
items.description: The most efficient water heating technology available, leveraging ambient air energy for dramatic utility savings.

items.title: Inconsistent Temperature
items.description: Fluctuating hot water output suggests thermostat failure, sediment buildup, or heating element degradation.

items.title: Discolored Water
items.description: Rusty or cloudy hot water indicates anode rod failure or tank corrosion requiring immediate attention.

items.title: Unusual Sounds
items.description: Popping or rumbling from the tank signals sediment accumulation reducing efficiency and accelerating wear.

sections.title: Upgrade Your Hot Water Network
sections.body: ComfortFlow engineers analyze flow rates, utility capacity, and household demand to recommend the optimal water heating configuration.

hero.headline: Smart Thermostats.
hero.body: Next-generation sensors and adaptive learning that track occupancy, humidity, and air quality to hold your exact set-point within half a degree.

sections.title: Whole-Home Control
sections.subtitle: The interface layer of your comfort network — precise, responsive, and always in sync with every system.

items.title: Precision Thermostats
items.description: Next-generation sensors that track occupancy, humidity, and air quality to maintain your exact set-point within 0.5 degrees.

items.title: Smart Automation
items.description: Centralized logic that balances whole-home systems against energy pricing and outdoor weather shifts.

items.title: Remote Control
items.description: Adjust schedules, monitor usage, and receive maintenance alerts from anywhere through a single app dashboard.

sections.title: Upgrade Your Climate Interface
sections.body: From smart thermostat installs to full-home zoning, ComfortFlow engineers precise control for every room.
